parameters.content:
## Live Budget Tracker -> fact_marketing_spend  (scheduled full-replace)

SETUP AFTER IMPORT:
1. On "Read Spend Tracker", pick your Microsoft Excel credential, then select the
   Workbook ("Marketing Budget Tracker 2026") and the Worksheet = **Spend Tracker**.
2. Range is preset A1:I2000 with keyRow=1 (header on row 2) and dataStartRow=2 (data from row 3).
   If the sheet layout changes (title row removed/added), adjust keyRow/dataStartRow.

BEHAVIOUR:
- Runs daily; reads the live Spend Tracker, then FULL-REPLACES source='budget_tracker'
  (delete all, re-insert) so edits/deletes/corrections are reflected exactly.
- Market -> region (UK/UK & IE -> UKI, BELUX -> BeLux, NL -> NL, ALL/blank -> UNASSIGNED).
- amount is NATIVE EUR; negative correction lines are kept (net = SUM(amount)).
- The "TEST IGNORE" sheet is excluded because we read only the Spend Tracker worksheet.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_marketing_spend
  (activity_date, quarter, budget_line, primary_audience, market_raw, region_id,
   status, owner, amount, currency, notes, source)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $6),
  $7, $8, $9, 'EUR', $10, 'budget_tracker');

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('budget_tracker', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, 0, 0);
